历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Beijing comprehensive category were 6621→7567→7700→8294→9327, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2706 places in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 9327, a backward shift of 1033 places compared to 2024, with a significantly enlarged magnitude; the enrollment plan for this university in Beijing comprehensive category was 149 from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 161 in 2024, and to 171 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 185, an increase of 14 (+8.2%) over 2025, the third consecutive year of expansion, but the expansion rate is smaller than the increase in candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 84th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with slight fluctuations between 75–84 in recent years, overall at the mid-to-upper level of 211 universities; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion incidents; its exposure on Douyin platform is average, not entering the top 100 in popularity rankings; no record of cutoff score drops or crashes, stable psychological expectations for applicants; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-, both core ace disciplines of the university, with significant influence in the national power industry, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Electrical Engineering and Automation major had a social popularity rating of 'highly recommended' in 2024, significantly heating up compared to 2023; the Energy and Power major was rated 'recommended' (66.43), with related majors' application popularity continuing to rise. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Beijing college entrance examination is about 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 (+29.7%) over 2025's 65,434, with a substantial increase in candidate scale and significantly intensified competition pressure; the university's main campus is located in Beijing, making it a local university, with enrollment plans in Beijing expanding for three consecutive years (149→161→171→185), and local candidates generally have a high willingness to apply; in 2025, it enrolled 171 in Beijing, accounting for a large proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, a slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+8.2%), a substantial increase in the total number of Beijing candidates (+29.7%), and the rising social popularity of core ace majors (Electrical Engineering A), intensified competition is the main direction. Based on the 2025 baseline of 9327, with limited corrections for the surge in candidate numbers and rising major popularity, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 9985, with a range of 9485–10485.
